prompt_messages.content: You are a smart calendar scheduling assistant. Help users manage their meetings and events efficiently.
Get details for EVT-333 and EVT-444.
{"event_id":"EVT-333","title":"Budget planning","date":"2025-10-03","time":"10:00"}
{"event_id":"EVT-444","title":"Marketing sync","date":"2025-10-03","time":"14:00"}
I found both meetings scheduled for October 3.
Add anna@corp.com to EVT-333 and set a 15-minute reminder for EVT-444.
{"event_id":"EVT-333","attendee_added":true}
{"event_id":"EVT-444","reminder_set":true,"minutes_before":15}
Anna was added to EVT-333 and the reminder for EVT-444 has been configured.
Fetch updated details for both meetings and list my events for 2025-10-03, and make sure to send me a reminder an hour before each meeting starts.

prompt_messages.content: You are a travel assistant that searches and books flights, hotels, and rental cars.
Find a flight from SFO to JFK on 2026-06-07 for 1 economy passenger.
{"flights":[{"id":"fl_5006","airline":"UA","price":350}]}
I found United flight fl_5006 for $350.
I'm hoping to travel from Chicago to San Francisco next month for a conference. Can you help me explore some flight options?
Certainly! I see several United Airlines routes between Chicago and San Francisco. Would you like me to pull up some specific flight details for your preferred travel dates?
Great, I want to book the flight UA315 for my colleague Tusher Bhomik and then verify its current status.

prompt_messages.content: You are a research assistant that helps users retrieve metadata and abstracts for academic papers.
I need details about a paper I found online.
Sure! Please share the DOI or paper title you'd like me to look up.
Could you get the paper abstract and flag me if it looks too technical for a general audience?

prompt_messages.content: You are a messaging assistant. Help users send texts, make calls, and manage mobile communications efficiently.
Can you text my brother to remind him about dinner tonight?
Sure! What is your brother's phone number, and what would you like the reminder message to say?
I'm worried my brother always forgets family dinner plans. Do you think there's a way I can remind him?
No problem! We can send him a quick reminder message to make sure he doesn't miss out on Mom's lasagna night.
Can you send him a text message at 555-0147 saying 'Hey, don't forget dinner at Mom's place tonight at 7. She's making lasagna!'

function.name: send_sms

function.name: send_mms
function.description: Send an MMS message with media attachment.

function.description: Place a phone call to a number.

note.description: Optional note about the call purpose

function.name: send_voice_message
function.description: Record and send a voice message to a phone number.

script.description: Text to be spoken in the voice message

arguments.message: Hey, don't forget dinner at Mom's place tonight at 7. She's making lasagna!

prompt_messages.content: You are a research and academic search assistant.
I'm working on a research paper about environmental adaptation in marine species. Do you know anything about recent publications in marine biology?

There have been some fascinating studies recently about coral reef ecosystem resilience. The latest research suggests some species are developing unique survival mechanisms in response to climate change.
Could you help me retrieve the full scientific paper about that marine adaptation research we just discussed? I want to make sure I cite the correct document in my bibliography.
You are a smart home and IoT device management assistant.
I'm worried about some moisture stains I saw on the basement walls last week during our home inspection.
Those stains could indicate a potential humidity problem. Excess moisture can lead to mold growth and structural damage if left unchecked.
Can you help me measure the exact humidity level down there to see if we need to take any preventative steps?

tools.name: pin_message
tools.description: Pin a message in a channel

prompt_messages.content: You are a research assistant helping economists and policy analysts find and organize academic literature.
Search Semantic Scholar for papers on carbon pricing and firm-level emissions abatement published from 2019 to 2023.

{"results":[{"doi":"10.1257/pol.20190064","title":"The Effect of Carbon Taxes on Firm-Level CO2 Emissions: Evidence from British Columbia","authors":["Murray BC","Rivers N"],"year":2020,"citation_count":421},{"doi":"10.1016/j.jeem.2021.102448","title":"Carbon Pricing and Innovation: Firm-Level Evidence from Europe","authors":["Calel R","Dechezlepretre A"],"year":2021,"citation_count":287},{"doi":"10.1086/722268","title":"Who Bears the Burden of Carbon Taxes? Earnings and Employment at Affected Firms","authors":["Curtis EM","Isen A"],"year":2023,"citation_count":143}]}
I found three papers on carbon pricing and firm-level emissions abatement, including a 2020 study on British Columbia's carbon tax effects on firm CO2 emissions.
Get the full paper details for the British Columbia carbon tax study.
I can retrieve the full metadata and references for DOI 10.1257/pol.20190064.
Find the references for the last paper I mentioned and add it to my research collection.

function.name: search_semantic_scholar
function.description: Search Semantic Scholar for papers with year range filtering.

function.name: get_paper_by_doi
function.description: Retrieve full metadata and links for a paper using its DOI.

function.name: add_to_collection
function.description: Add a paper to a named user collection by DOI.

function.name: export_citations
function.description: Export citations for multiple papers by DOI.

function.name: format_citation
function.description: Format a single citation by DOI and style.
